name: fix-deadlock
description: Fix the deadlock in this two-lock system. Thread A holds lock1 and waits for lock2, Thread B holds lock2 and waits for lock1.
context:
import threading
import time

class TransferService:
    def __init__(self, account_a, account_b):
        self.account_a = account_a
        self.account_b = account_b
        self.lock_a = threading.Lock()
        self.lock_b = threading.Lock()
    
    def transfer(self, amount):
        with self.lock_a:
            time.sleep(0.01)  # Simulate processing
            with self.lock_b:
                self.account_a.balance -= amount
                self.account_b.balance += amount
    
    def reverse_transfer(self, amount):
        with self.lock_b:  # DEADLOCK: reversed lock order!
            time.sleep(0.01)
            with self.lock_a:
                self.account_b.balance -= amount
                self.account_a.balance += amount
expected: Fixed transfer service with consistent lock ordering or lock-free design
